race.description: Calcutta At The Tavern Sunday Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: CHARLOTTE'S HERE (15) ran on late from the better gate fourth-up with a slashing third over 1100m at Gatton. Finds a winnable contest today and can stalk the good tempo. Go close. STEFFI ELECTRICA (11) nice filly back from a break of nine weeks. Shed her Maiden tag at this track and trip last July. Primed for this with the good trial placing over 900m at Beaudesert. Maps well with the nose roll coming off. Can make her presence felt. HEY DAISY (5) back in class as the $2.70 fav with a fading fifth in the heavy (8) going over 1100m at the Sunshine Coast. Goes well here and worth another chance in this easier contest. DANCE GAVIN DANCE (3) undefeated at his last two outings and gets weight relief with Baker's 2kg claim. Maps well and hard to stop in this vein of form.
